'''''Ramit''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that delivered munitions and repairs to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Red Wind]]''. However her arrival was timed to a rebel [[Attack on the Red Wind|attack]] consisting of 9 [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90s]] and two [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]], one of them piloted by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]. She was destroyed by the Rebel ace.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
